name: Sequence of Sitting Spaces
paraphrase: Put in a sequence of graded sitting spaces throughout the building, varying according to their degree of enclosure. The most formal sitting spaces are enclosed entirely in rooms of their own; the least formal sit in corners of other rooms without any screen around them; the intermediate ones have a partial enclosure that keeps them connected to a larger space while still partly separate. Together they reinforce the building's social and intimacy gradients by offering an appropriate place to settle for every kind of occasion.
